semantic.role: Infrastructure LLM transport provider implementing the LLMTransport interface for Google Gemini models. A thin API caller that wraps the @google/generative-ai SDK.
responsibilities: Initializes the GoogleGenerativeAI client using the API key from ProviderConfig.
Sends text generation requests to the specified Gemini model via the SDK's generateContent method.
Returns generated text and usage information (token counts) to the caller.
outOfScope: Prompt generation or prompt engineering — this module takes complete prompts as input.
Response parsing beyond extracting text and basic usage metadata.
LLM orchestration, retry logic, or fallback between providers.
Configuration loading or validation — config is injected via ProviderConfig.
invariants: Must implement the LLMTransport interface (contract with base.ts).
Must not modify or interpret the prompt content — it is a pass-through API caller.
Uses only the @google/generative-ai SDK for Gemini interactions.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a concrete Gemini transport implementation in the LLM provider layer, maintaining a clean separation between SDK calling and higher-level LLM orchestration.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: The recent commit was a general release gate fix and synchronization of accumulated source changes; there is no evidence of specific semantic changes to this file.

publicSurface.description: Implements LLMTransport to send content generation requests to the Gemini API. Consumed by LLM orchestration layers that require a standard transport interface for Gemini.
